title: POS Tagging & Named Entity Recognition
code:
import numpy as np

def run_practice():
    states = [0, 1]  # Noun, Verb
    obs = [0, 1]     # 'cat', 'runs'
    trans = np.array([[0.4, 0.6], [0.5, 0.5]])
    emit = np.array([[0.8, 0.2], [0.1, 0.9]])
    start = np.array([0.9, 0.1])
    v0 = start * emit[:, obs[0]]
    v1_noun = np.max(v0 * trans[:, 0] * emit[0, obs[1]])
    assert np.allclose(v1_noun, 0.0576)
    print('[PASS] Viterbi manual calculation matches assertions.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
